question:
Liverpool vs. Aston Villa: Both Teams to Score

Description: In the upcoming Premier League game between Liverpool and Aston Villa, scheduled for November 1 at 4:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Liverpool and Aston Villa each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on premierleague.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.premierleague.com/
event_title:
Liverpool vs. Aston Villa: Both Teams to Score

Description: In the upcoming Premier League game between Liverpool and Aston Villa, scheduled for November 1 at 4:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Liverpool and Aston Villa each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on premierleague.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.premierleague.com/

evidences.title: Aston Villa v Liverpool: 12 pre-match stats to know - Liverpool FC
evidences.content: Liverpool have scored at least twice in 10 of their last 11 Premier League away games against Villa – including the last eight in a row. Only Manchester City (11 at Fulham) and Manchester United (nine at West Bromwich Albion) have had longer runs of scoring at least two goals away at an opponent in the competition. The Reds, who won the reverse fixture at Anfield 2-0 in November, last did the league double over Villa in 2021-22, while they last did so without conceding in 1995-96. You have to accept cookies in order to view this content on our site. Watch on YouTube Liverpool have won 10 of their last 11 Premier League games on a Friday since a 4-2 loss at Arsenal back in April 2004. [...] They have not won their final away league match in any of the last three seasons (drawn two, lost one), with these games seeing 19 goals scored in total (4-4 v Southampton, 3-3 v Aston Villa, 2-3 v Brighton & Hove Albion). Each of the last two Premier League meetings between the clubs at Villa Park have ended level (3-3 in 2023-24 and 2-2 in 2024-25). Mohamed Salah, who Arne Slot said last week is 'close to returning' from injury, has had a hand in 14 goals across his last 12 Premier League ap...

evidences.title: Premier League Matchweek Predictor Game, Predict Scores & Results
evidences.content: ##### How do I score points? If you accurately predict a result (a win, draw or loss), you will score five points. If you're a real expert and accurately predict an exact score, you will score 10 points. That means if you get the exact scores for all 10 fixtures, you will score a whopping 100 points. - Example 1: You predict Man Utd 2-1 Brighton, and it finishes 3-2. You get the right result (Man Utd win) but the wrong score. You are awarded five points. - Example 2: You predict Aston Villa 1-1 Man City, and it ends 1-1. You correctly predicted the right result and score, so are awarded 10 points. You will need a myPremierLeague account to play. You will be prompted to log in/register when you click to play the game above.
